name: grow24-ai
description: Enterprise SaaS Platform for Personal & Business Management

scripts.dev:both: concurrently -k -n main,univer -c cyan,magenta "UNIVER_PORT=${UNIVER_PORT:-3002} npm run dev" "UNIVER_PORT=${UNIVER_PORT:-3002} npm run dev:univer"
scripts.dev:hbmp-one: cd HBMP_One/client && CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=1 CHOKIDAR_INTERVAL=1000 HBMP_ONE_PORT=${HBMP_ONE_PORT:-5175} HBMP_ONE_BASE=/HBMP_One/ VITE_API_URL=/api npx vite
scripts.dev:hbmp-docs-platform: cd HBMP_DOCS_PLATFORM/client && CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=1 CHOKIDAR_INTERVAL=1000 HBMP_DOCS_PORT=${HBMP_DOCS_PORT:-5177} HBMP_DOCS_BASE=/HBMP_DOCS_PLATFORM/ VITE_API_URL=/api npx vite
scripts.dev:ivvychainv2: cd ivvychainv2 && CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=1 CHOKIDAR_INTERVAL=1000 HOST=0.0.0.0 PORT=${IVVY_PORT:-5176} WDS_SOCKET_PORT=${IVVY_PORT:-5176} BROWSER=none PUBLIC_URL=/ivvychainv2 npm start
scripts.dev:app-manager: cd app_manager && CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=1 CHOKIDAR_INTERVAL=1000 APP_MANAGER_PORT=${APP_MANAGER_PORT:-5183} APP_MANAGER_BASE=/app_manager/ APP_MANAGER_API_PATH=/app_manager/api APP_MANAGER_API_PORT=${APP_MANAGER_API_PORT:-5185} npm run dev
scripts.dev:hbmp-form-manager: cd hbmp_form_manager/frontend && CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=1 CHOKIDAR_INTERVAL=1000 HBMP_FORM_MANAGER_PORT=${HBMP_FORM_MANAGER_PORT:-5186} HBMP_FORM_MANAGER_BASE=/hbmp_form_manager/ HBMP_FORM_MANAGER_API_PORT=${HBMP_FORM_MANAGER_API_PORT:-5187} VITE_API_BASE=/hbmp_form_manager/api npx vite
scripts.dev:google: cd Google/meet/frontend && CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=1 CHOKIDAR_INTERVAL=1000 GOOGLE_BASE=/Google/ npm run dev
scripts.dev:agentbot: cd HBMP_AgentBot && HOST=0.0.0.0 PORT=${AGENTBOT_PORT:-5190} BACKEND_PORT=${AGENTBOT_API_PORT:-5188} AGENTBOT_BASE=/HBMP_AgentBot/ npm run frontend:dev
scripts.dev:agentbot-api: cd HBMP_AgentBot && PORT=${AGENTBOT_API_PORT:-5188} npm run backend
scripts.dev:mxgraph-reactflow: cd Mxgraph_ReactFlow && ([ -d node_modules ] || npx pnpm@9 install) && npx pnpm@9 --filter @hbmp/web dev
scripts.dev:mxgraph-server: cd Mxgraph_ReactFlow && ([ -d node_modules ] || npx pnpm@9 install) && DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-mysql://root:root@127.0.0.1:3306/hbmp} npx pnpm@9 --filter server db:generate && npx pnpm@9 --filter server dev
scripts.dev:with-mxgraph: concurrently -k -n main,mxgraph -c cyan,green "CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=${CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING:-1} CHOKIDAR_INTERVAL=${CHOKIDAR_INTERVAL:-1000} vite" "npm run dev:mxgraph-reactflow"
scripts.dev:mxgraph-standalone: cd mxgraph_standalone/apps/web && PORT=${MXGRAPH_STANDALONE_PORT:-5192} HOSTNAME=0.0.0.0 node server.js
scripts.dev:univer-hbmp: concurrently -k -n univer,hbmp -c magenta,green "UNIVER_PORT=${UNIVER_PORT:-3002} npm run dev:univer" "npm run dev:hbmp-one"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --names main,univer,hbmp,hbmpdocs,appmanager,hbmpform,hbmpformapi,agentbot,agentbotapi,ivvy,microsoft,osm,imgproc,google,mcp,mxgraph,mxgraphapi,mxstandalone --prefix-colors cyan,magenta,green,yellow,blue,cyan,magenta,green,yellow,red,white,gray,cyan,magenta,blue,green,yellow,white "HBMP_ONE_PORT=${HBMP_ONE_PORT:-5175} HBMP_DOCS_PORT=${HBMP_DOCS_PORT:-5177} UNIVER_PORT=${UNIVER_PORT:-3002} HBMP_API_PORT=${HBMP_API_PORT:-4000} APP_MANAGER_PORT=${APP_MANAGER_PORT:-5183} APP_MANAGER_API_PORT=${APP_MANAGER_API_PORT:-5185} HBMP_FORM_MANAGER_PORT=${HBMP_FORM_MANAGER_PORT:-5186} HBMP_FORM_MANAGER_API_PORT=${HBMP_FORM_MANAGER_API_PORT:-5187} AGENTBOT_PORT=${AGENTBOT_PORT:-5190} AGENTBOT_API_PORT=${AGENTBOT_API_PORT:-5188} MCP_SERVER_PORT=${MCP_SERVER_PORT:-5184} CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=1 CHOKIDAR_INTERVAL=1000 npm run dev" "UNIVER_PORT=${UNIVER_PORT:-3002} npm run dev:univer" "npm run dev:hbmp-one" "npm run dev:hbmp-docs-platform" "APP_MANAGER_PORT=${APP_MANAGER_PORT:-5183} APP_MANAGER_API_PORT=${APP_MANAGER_API_PORT:-5185} npm run dev:app-manager" "HBMP_FORM_MANAGER_PORT=${HBMP_FORM_MANAGER_PORT:-5186} HBMP_FORM_MANAGER_API_PORT=${HBMP_FORM_MANAGER_API_PORT:-5187} npm run dev:hbmp-form-manager" "HBMP_FORM_MANAGER_PORT=${HBMP_FORM_MANAGER_PORT:-5186} HBMP_FORM_MANAGER_API_PORT=${HBMP_FORM_MANAGER_API_PORT:-5187} npm run dev:hbmp-form-manager-backend" "AGENTBOT_PORT=${AGENTBOT_PORT:-5190} AGENTBOT_API_PORT=${AGENTBOT_API_PORT:-5188} npm run dev:agentbot" "AGENTBOT_API_PORT=${AGENTBOT_API_PORT:-5188} npm run dev:agentbot-api" "npm run dev:ivvychainv2" "MICROSOFT_PORT=${MICROSOFT_PORT:-5180} npm run dev:microsoft" "OSM_PORT=${OSM_PORT:-5181} npm run dev:openstreetmaps" "IMAGE_PROCESSING_PORT=${IMAGE_PROCESSING_PORT:-5182} npm run dev:imageprocessing" "npm run dev:google" "MCP_SERVER_PORT=${MCP_SERVER_PORT:-5184} npm run dev:mcp-server" "npm run dev:mxgraph-reactflow" "npm run dev:mxgraph-server" "MXGRAPH_STANDALONE_PORT=${MXGRAPH_STANDALONE_PORT:-5192} npm run dev:mxgraph-standalone"
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:hbmp-one && npm run build:hbmp-docs-platform && npm run build:google && npm run build:app-manager && npm run build:hbmp-form-manager && npm run build:hbmp-agentbot && npm run build:mxgraph-reactflow && npm run build:ivvychainv2 && npm run build:univer:static && npm run copy:univer && npm run copy:openstreetmaps && npm run copy:microsoft && npm run copy:imageprocessing && npm run copy:mcp-server && node scripts/patch-univer-dist-paths.mjs && node scripts/verify-univer-dist.mjs && node scripts/verify-hbmp-dist.mjs && node scripts/verify-agentbot-dist.mjs && node scripts/verify-mxgraph-standalone.mjs
scripts.build:hbmp-one: cd HBMP_One/client && npm ci && HBMP_ONE_BASE=/HBMP_One/ VITE_API_URL="${VITE_API_URL:-/api}" npx vite build && mkdir -p ../../dist/HBMP_One && rm -rf ../../dist/HBMP_One && cp -r dist/. ../../dist/HBMP_One/
scripts.build:hbmp-docs-platform: cd HBMP_DOCS_PLATFORM/client && npm ci && HBMP_DOCS_BASE=/HBMP_DOCS_PLATFORM/ VITE_API_URL="${VITE_API_URL:-/api}" npx vite build && mkdir -p ../../dist/HBMP_DOCS_PLATFORM && rm -rf ../../dist/HBMP_DOCS_PLATFORM && cp -r dist/. ../../dist/HBMP_DOCS_PLATFORM/
scripts.build:google: cd Google/meet/frontend && npm ci && GOOGLE_BASE=/Google/ npx vite build && mkdir -p ../../../dist/Google && rm -rf ../../../dist/Google && cp -r dist/. ../../../dist/Google/
scripts.build:app-manager: cd app_manager && npm ci && APP_MANAGER_BASE=/app_manager/ APP_MANAGER_API_PATH=/app_manager/api npx vite build && mkdir -p ../dist/app_manager && rm -rf ../dist/app_manager && cp -r dist/. ../dist/app_manager/
scripts.build:hbmp-form-manager: cd hbmp_form_manager/frontend && npm ci && HBMP_FORM_MANAGER_BASE=/hbmp_form_manager/ HBMP_FORM_MANAGER_API_PORT=${HBMP_FORM_MANAGER_API_PORT:-5187} VITE_API_BASE=/hbmp_form_manager/api npx vite build && mkdir -p ../../dist/hbmp_form_manager && rm -rf ../../dist/hbmp_form_manager && cp -r dist/. ../../dist/hbmp_form_manager/
scripts.build:hbmp-agentbot: cd HBMP_AgentBot && npm ci && NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 AGENTBOT_BASE=/HBMP_AgentBot/ npm run build:production && mkdir -p ../dist/HBMP_AgentBot && rm -rf ../dist/HBMP_AgentBot && cp -r client/dist/. ../dist/HBMP_AgentBot/
scripts.build:mxgraph-reactflow: cd Mxgraph_ReactFlow && npx pnpm@9 install && NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_PATH=/Mxgraph_ReactFlow npx pnpm@9 --filter @hbmp/web build && node ../scripts/package-mxgraph-standalone.mjs
scripts.build:ivvychainv2: cd ivvychainv2 && npm install && CI= PUBLIC_URL=/ivvychainv2 npm run build && rm -rf ../dist/ivvychainv2 && mkdir -p ../dist/ivvychainv2 && cp -r build/. ../dist/ivvychainv2/
scripts.build:univer: cd univer && CI=true pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm build && pnpm build:demo
scripts.build:univer:static: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10.24.0 --activate && cd univer && pnpm run install:ci && pnpm run build:static
scripts.copy:univer: mkdir -p dist/univer && cp -r univer/examples/local/. dist/univer/ && (test -f dist/univer/index.html || cp scripts/univer-index.html dist/univer/index.html)
scripts.copy:openstreetmaps: mkdir -p dist/OpenStreetMaps && cp OpenStreetMaps/index.html OpenStreetMaps/style.css dist/OpenStreetMaps/ && (test -f OpenStreetMaps/script.js && cp OpenStreetMaps/script.js dist/OpenStreetMaps/ || true)
scripts.build:all: npm run build:main && npm run build:univer
